privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetically generated data injected via setup_task.sh into the Snipe-IT database. Three defective laptops (LPT-ERR-01, LPT-ERR-02, LPT-ERR-03) are created with randomized purchase costs and dates, and assigned to three synthetic users (jdoe, asmith, bwayne). The verifier strictly checks that the replacement laptops (LPT-REP-01, LPT-REP-02, LPT-REP-03) exactly match the original randomized costs and dates, and are checked out to the original respective users.
